plain_1: 17+ expert resources organized into a structured framework for buyer-side SaaS evaluation.
plain_2: Master churn analysis, concentration risk, revenue quality, and deal-specific red flags —
text_3: How to use this guide: Each section below covers a critical dimension of
text_4: SaaS due diligence. Start with Understanding Churn if you're new to buyer-side
plain_5: analysis, or jump directly to a topic. For a quick-start, download the
plain_6: — it covers every check in this guide in a printable format.
plain_8: Churn is the single most important metric in SaaS acquisitions — and the most commonly
plain_9: manipulated. These resources teach you how real churn analysis works, how sellers hide it,
plain_10: and how to compute the numbers yourself.
plain_11: Beyond headline churn, several structural risks can destroy deal value. These resources help
plain_12: you identify concentration traps, annual-plan decay, zombie MRR, and inactive accounts that
plain_14: Move beyond back-of-the-envelope multiples. These resources provide structured frameworks
plain_15: and scores for evaluating the actual quality of a SaaS target's revenue and retention.
plain_17: Ready to evaluate a specific opportunity? These resources walk through the end-to-end
plain_18: process of buying a SaaS business, including red flags to avoid and a printable checklist
plain_19: to use during active due diligence.
plain_21: Every SaaS due diligence resource from Churn Lens in a single list. Bookmark this page —
plain_22: it's your command center for buyer-side evaluation.
plain_23: The 23-point churn audit checklist catches everything a seller won't tell you —
